description: Data loaded from CSV file: 160.csv (Dataset: wwc_outcomes)

fields.name: year
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the years in which the Women's World Cup tournaments were held, indicating the specific event date for each outcome entry.

fields.name: team
fields.sample_values: ARG, AUS, BRA, CAN, CHI, ..., SUI, SWE, THA, TPE, USA
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field identifies the country or region that each team represents in an international women's sports competition, likely the FIFA Women's World Cup.

fields.name: score
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field likely represents a numerical outcome or achievement score, such as a test or assessment result, assigned to participants in an educational or evaluative context, ranging from 0 to 13.

fields.name: round
fields.sample_values: Final, Group, Quarter Final, Round of 16, Semi Final, Third Place Playoff
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the stage or phase of a tournament (likely the FIFA Women's World Cup), specifying at which round a team or match outcome occurred.

fields.name: yearly_game_id
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents a sequential identifier for each game played in a given year within the context of a women's world cup tournament, distinguishing individual matches for tracking outcomes.

fields.name: team_num
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field identifies which team (Team 1 or Team 2) was involved in a particular match outcome, likely representing opposing sides in a sports competition dataset such as World Women's Cup results.

fields.name: win_status
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the result of a competitive event (such as a sports match), capturing whether a participant or team lost, tied, or won.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: wwc_outcomes (568 rows × 7 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 160.csv (Dataset: wwc_outcomes)

### Schema (7 fields)
  - year -- type: int64, values: 1991, 1995, 1999, 2003, 2007, 2011, 2015, 2019
  - team -- type: object, values: ARG, AUS, BRA, CAN, CHI, ..., SUI, SWE, THA, TPE, USA
  - score -- type: int64, values: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, ..., 7, 8, 10, 11, 13
  - round -- type: object, values: Final, Group, Quarter Final, Round of 16, Semi Final, Third Place Playoff
  - yearly_game_id -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, ..., 48, 49, 50, 51, 52
  - team_num -- type: int64, values: 1, 2
  - win_status -- type: object, values: Lost, Tie, Won

### Sample Data (first 5 rows)
```
   year team  score  round  yearly_game_id  team_num win_status
0  1991  CHN      4  Group               1         1        Won
1  1991  NOR      0  Group               1         2       Lost
2  1991  DEN      3  Group               2         1        Won
3  1991  NZL      0  Group               2         2       Lost
4  1991  JPN      0  Group               3         1       Lost
```
